_comment: OPTIONAL override map. The importer auto-resolves each sheet tab to the canonical evaluator string from game_evaluations by case/space-insensitive match, so you usually need NOTHING here. Copy to config/evaluator-map.json (gitignored) and add an entry ONLY for tabs the dry-run reports under unresolvedTab or ambiguousTab. Format: "TabName": "Exact DB Evaluator String". Remove this _comment key in your real file.
